subcodes.title: Az Bagh-i-Ilahi
subcodes.first_line: Hailing from the godly garden, Invested with the Burning Bush, That fresh and novel Youth is come!
subcodes.first_line_orig: از باغ الهی با سدره ناری آن تازه غلام آمد های های هذا جذب اللهی هذا خلع
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @chastisement and requital, @call to action
